featureAreas.name: auth
featureAreas.summary: Phone plus OTP sign-in (request-otp, verify-otp), JWT access/refresh pair persisted in TokenStore, transparent single-flight refresh-and-retry on 401 with rotation, best-effort server logout, session-expired hook wired to local sign-out.

featureAreas.name: debts
featureAreas.summary: Offline-first debt ledger: record, edit (amount/note/due date), soft-delete (archive), restore, joined debt views with payment progress and status ranking; local rows marked pending and reconciled with POST/PATCH/DELETE /debts and /debts/:id/restore with If-Match versioning.

featureAreas.name: customers
featureAreas.summary: Customer book: add, per-customer aggregate views (owed, worst status, last activity), delete with pendingDelete retention until DELETE /customers/:id propagates, customer detail activity timeline, contact import helpers.

featureAreas.name: payments
featureAreas.summary: Record payments against debts with locally minted OWM-xxxxx receipt references (server mints the authoritative reference on sync via POST /debts/:id/payments), undo last payment, recent-payments views feeding receipt pickers.

featureAreas.name: reminders-send-and-schedule
featureAreas.summary: Send now or schedule reminders per debt over SMS/WhatsApp (call channel exists in the DB enum); scheduled rows promoted to sent locally by a mock cron; retry of failed reminders re-creates the pay-link; all rows reconciled via POST /reminders with channel, payLinkUrl and scheduledFor.

featureAreas.name: reminders-deeplink-sends
featureAreas.summary: Immediate sends open the device composer via deeplink: wa.me URL for WhatsApp or an sms: URI with prefilled body including a pay link; falls back to copying the message to the clipboard when no handler opens.

featureAreas.name: reminder-templates
featureAreas.summary: Reminder templates and tone screen: tone cards, {name}/{amount}/{due} token template with live preview; tone persisted on the business profile (reminderTone) and pushed via PUT /business.

featureAreas.name: pay-links
featureAreas.summary: Paystack debtor pay-links: POST /debts/:id/pay-link creates a hosted link keyed off the debt syncId, embedded in reminder messages; deterministic local stub URL fallback when offline or unsynced; webhook reconciliation seam exists but is an empty stub.

featureAreas.name: sync
featureAreas.summary: Offline-first delta sync: PUSH pending rows in FK-safe order (customers, debts, payments, reminders, business) with idempotent creates, If-Match versions and 409 last-writer-wins conflict resolution, then PULL GET /sync?since=cursor with upserts and tombstones, business refresh and cursor-paged GET /notifications; pending-count stream for the Backup and sync screen.

featureAreas.name: billing-iap
featureAreas.summary: In-app-purchase billing (StoreKit 2 / Play Billing via in_app_purchase): plan subscriptions and consumable credit bundles, server-side receipt verification via POST /billing/verify-receipt, entitlement state (pending/active/gracePeriod/expired) from GET /subscription as sole authority, restore purchases, billing history from GET /billing/history, billingMode flag seam.

featureAreas.name: credits-usage-meter
featureAreas.summary: Unified OweMe-credits meter (model rev 2, one pool): GET /usage credits {used, balance, monthlyGrant, periodStart}, cached in BillingService.usage, rendered on the Usage screen and the subscription summary row; credit-bundle purchases echo the new balance and trigger a meter re-read.

featureAreas.name: bvum-enforcement
featureAreas.summary: Business-value-under-management: GET /bvum (value, ceiling, recommendedPlan) powers the scale screen; instant client-side enforcement mirrors the server rule when recording a debt (new debt pushing BVUM past the plan ceiling is blocked with an upgrade sheet; collecting existing debt never blocked).

featureAreas.name: payout-account
featureAreas.summary: Owner-only payout destination for pay-link settlements: Paystack-proxied bank list (GET /banks), NUBAN account-name resolve (POST /payout-account/resolve), read and save the payout account (GET/PUT /payout-account); backend derives the Paystack subaccount.

featureAreas.name: voice-parse
featureAreas.summary: Voice-to-debt: on-device speech capture to transcript, backend AI parse via POST /voice/parse (debits 1 AI credit; PlanRequired flips the out-of-credits gate), cheap on-device heuristic fallback offline/web, plus an offline voice-note queue that creates pending-parse debts reconciled on sync.

featureAreas.name: insights
featureAreas.summary: AI insight slot on the dashboard: shipped as a deliberate unpowered placeholder that renders nothing (SizedBox.shrink) until the backend insight surface exists; no endpoint consumed yet.

featureAreas.name: notifications
featureAreas.summary: In-app notification feed: local rows written on payments/reminders, server rows pulled via cursor-paged GET /notifications during sync, unread badge stream, mark-all-read; plus owner push preferences (payments/overdue/delivery/weekly) via GET/PUT /notification-preferences.

featureAreas.name: staff
featureAreas.summary: Staff and roles (coarse owner|staff per supersede S-4): roster with plan seat usage from GET /staff, invite by phone via POST /staff (403 PLAN_REQUIRED routes to upgrade), activate/deactivate via PATCH /staff/:id (owner protected server-side).

featureAreas.name: printable-receipt-statement
featureAreas.summary: Printable payment receipt screen (brand header, receipt reference, share on WhatsApp, download PDF and print actions); all three actions are currently placeholder snackbars, no backend or file/print layer consumed.

featureAreas.name: business-profile
featureAreas.summary: Business profile (name, owner, phone, category, currency, reminder tone, plan, paystackSubaccount): onboarding setup and settings edit saved locally then upserted every sync cycle via PUT /business with If-Match, refreshed from GET /business on pull.

featureAreas.name: dashboard-and-activity
featureAreas.summary: Dashboard aggregates computed locally from the drift DB (outstanding total, owing customers, recovered this month, due today, overdue) plus a merged activity feed and search; no dedicated backend endpoint, derives entirely from synced rows.
